action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh. Analysis: Need to build CL system for CIFAR-100 class-incremental learning. Will use ResNet18 + Experience Replay as baseline. Decision: Write model, train, and predict scripts. Start with 5 epochs per task to get baseline timing and score quickly.
